---
name: Integration Request
about: Propose connecting AISecretary to an external service
title: 'Integration: '
labels: integration, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Service

What service should AISecretary integrate with? (e.g., Slack, GitHub Issues, Notion)

## Use case

How would this integration be used in a solo founder's workflow?

## Proposed behavior

- What data flows in? (e.g., new Slack messages create tasks)
- What data flows out? (e.g., task updates post to Slack)
- Should the Co-Pilot be able to trigger it via tool calling?

## Auth approach

How does the service authenticate? (API key, OAuth, webhook, etc.)

## Would you like to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR
- [ ] No, just suggesting the idea
